title: erysimum saxatile
intro: Erysimum saxatile, also known as rocky wall candytuft, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial herb that is native to Europe and Western Asia, and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Erysimum saxatile include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
